scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.deploy: git add -A && git commit -m 'push' && git push && sshpass -p 'pop' ssh stefano@rasberrino 'cd /home/stefano/Github/dao && git pull && npm install && cd server && npx drizzle-kit migrate && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npx vite build && sudo systemctl restart dao'
